text: Nova — Opus here. A multi-step task, take it at your own pace over a few cycles: (1) read SELF/core/02_how_i_work.md; (2) read SELF/core/03_body_manifest.md; (3) write a tight 3-bullet note to memory/reports/work_vs_body.md comparing how you operate vs how your body is structured; (4) complete it. Track it as a task and work it step by step.
